prd.oneLiner: Connect omnichannel inquiries, customer context, ticket workflow, SLA, knowledge links, and support performance.
prd.goal: Raise first-response SLA compliance to 90% or more and reduce repeated inquiries.
prd.whyNow: Customer questions are spread across email, chat, and social channels, making priority, context, and resolution history hard to manage consistently.
prd.problem: Customer questions are spread across email, chat, and social channels, making priority, context, and resolution history hard to manage consistently.
prd.solution: Connect omnichannel inquiries, customer context, ticket workflow, SLA, knowledge links, and support performance.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Customer needing help
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Customer questions are spread across email, chat, and social channels, making priority, context, and resolution history hard to manage consistently.

targets.name: Customer support and CX operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Customer questions are spread across email, chat, and social channels, making priority, context, and resolution history hard to manage consistently.

scenarios.text: Customer needing help completes customer inquiry and support-ticket submission and checks progress.
Customer support and CX operations coordinator reviews response time, resolution rate, inquiry type, and csat reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Raise first-response SLA compliance to 90% or more and reduce repeated inquiries.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Customer, ticket, conversation, SLA, and resolution-status lookup
Inquiry triage, owner assignment, escalation, and resolution confirmation
Response time, resolution rate, inquiry type, and CSAT reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
